summary:
The `test.sh` script ran successfully and reported "PASS: Pagination is correct across page boundaries". This indicates that the off-by-one pagination bug has been fixed.
The problem was an incorrect offset calculation in `app/app.py`, specifically the line `offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)`. The fix involved changing this line to `offset = (page - 1) * per_page`. This change corrected the pagination logic, ensuring that pages do not overlap or skip items.
